tour_step1_text: Create a Page Scout to monitor any URL for changes, or a Beat Scout to track a beat or location and discover under-reported stories. Each scout runs on a schedule and notifies you when it finds something new.
tour_step2_text: Every scout you create appears here. See its status — whether it found new results, matched your criteria, or is awaiting its first run. Run any scout on demand, or filter by location and topic.
tour_step3_text: Scouts extract atomic facts — called information units — from every source they find. Browse, filter, and search semantically across everything your scouts have collected.
tour_step4_text: Select units manually or let AI pick the most relevant ones. Then prepare an export for your CMS or download as Markdown.
tour_step5_text: Scrape any webpage, X account, or Instagram profile — no scout needed. Describe what data you want in plain language, and download the results as CSV.
upgrade_hint: Upgrade naar Pro voor 750 maandelijkse credits en ontgrendel onbeperkt potentieel.

transport_trackDescription: Alert when watched vessels or aircraft enter your selected area, or when watched satellites are predicted to pass over it. Criteria optionally filter entry alerts.
transport_areaHint: You will be alerted when a watched object enters this radius around the selected location.
transport_watchIdsHintVessel: Een of meer MMSI-nummers van schepen, gescheiden door komma's. Vind de MMSI van een schip op
transport_watchIdsHintAircraft: Een of meer ICAO-hexcodes van vliegtuigen, gescheiden door komma's. Vind de hexcode van een vliegtuig op
transport_watchIdsHintSatellite: Een of meer NORAD-id's van satellieten, gescheiden door komma's. Vind NORAD-id's op
transport_errorWatchIdsRequired: Voer minstens één te volgen ID in.
transport_criteriaHint: Optional filter evaluated only when a watched object enters the area. Adds 1 credit per run.
transport_errorGeofence: Choose an area to enter. Fleet Scout alerts when watched objects enter it.
transport_errorLat: Enter a valid latitude between -90 and 90.
transport_errorLon: Enter a valid longitude between -180 and 180.
transport_errorRadius: Enter a radius between 1 and {max} km.
transport_errorWatchIdFormat: "{id}" isn't a valid ID for this mode.
transport_errorCredits: This schedule needs about {credits} credits/month — more than your balance.
transport_baselineReadyHint: Live check complete with {count} current matches. Name and schedule the scout next.
transport_testChanged: The setup changed while the test was running. Test the watched IDs again.
